items.claim: Dricus du Plessis looked tired and his cardio held up worse than expected in the third round.
items.quote: DDP looked tired in the third round. Yeah, his cardio held up a lot worse than I expected.

items.claim: Sean Strickland is more marketable and brings in more eyes than Jack Hermansson.
items.quote: Strickland is more marketable than than Hocket. I will say that. They tried to get Strickland B2 and he brought in a lot more eyes.

items.claim: Ruffy or Jean Silva are stylistic threats to beat Ilia Topuria if he stays composed.
items.quote: I think if you want someone to like actually beat Ilia when he's being composed, it's probably going to be someone like Ruffy or Jean Silva.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has very heavy hands and uses ground and pound to open up submissions or finish fights.
items.quote: he's mainly a grappler, but he does actually have very heavy hands. He tries to get to the body lock and then just find trips or throws from there. On the ground, he uses ground and pound to open up subs or just end the fight

items.claim: Abdul Hussein can be countered because of the risks he takes while fighting in close.
items.quote: He definitely can be countered because the risks he takes while in close

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has been outgrappled in a few past fights despite grappling being his main game plan.
items.quote: he has been outgrappled a few times surprisingly despite it being his main game plan.

items.claim: Cody Gibson ignores defense entirely and throws naked calf kicks, which has previously cost him and led to a knockout loss.
items.quote: The fact that he throws naked calf kicks has cost him a few times now, including getting him knocked out in his last fight. He really just does straight up ignore defense in its entirety.
